channel.title: Harald W. Bøe
channel.description: Recent content on Harald W. Bøe

item.title: About
item.description: Hi, I’m Harald. Thanks for checking out my page! I developed an interest for computers and technology early on and built my first computer when I was in my early teens. Geology is also something I enjoyed when growing up so when deciding what to study it was either computer science (CS) or going a more regular engineering path with a bit of CS. I chose the latter and learned CS on the side.
